title: Fake Blocks Mod
description: FakeBlocks adds phantom versions of vanilla blocks that look identical but have no collision, letting you walk right through them — perfect for secret passages, traps or fooling friends.
body:
FakeBlocks brings a brand new layer of creativity and deception to your Minecraft world. Ever wanted a secret passage hidden behind a bookshelf? A trap disguised as a diamond block floor? FakeBlocks makes it possible.

What does it do? FakeBlocks adds phantom versions of vanilla blocks that look completely identical to their real counterparts — but have no collision, meaning players and mobs can walk straight through them. From dirt to netherite blocks, every fake variant is craftable and fully survival-friendly.

How do you craft them? Simply combine any supported vanilla block with No-Collision Dust in a crafting table to get its fake variant.

![Crafting recipe no collision dust](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8222a56335303c00e931fb5e52f642a2c0b429c5.png)

![Crafting recipe Fake Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68f7aaa3cd7cf71d4a4f24f587347c698b09659d.png)

Features

🧱 Over 150 fake block variants
👁️ Visually identical to real blocks — no way to tell them apart
🔧 Survival-friendly crafting recipe for every block

Supported Blocks

Stone & Terrain: Dirt, Grass Block, Stone, Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Polished Granite, Polished Diorite, Polished Andesite, Cobblestone, Mossy Cobblestone, Gravel, Sand, Red Sand, Sandstone, Smooth Sandstone, Red Sandstone, Smooth Red Sandstone, Smooth Stone, Bedrock, Obsidian, Crying Obsidian, Clay, Tuff, Polished Tuff, Tuff Bricks, Calcite

Deepslate: Deepslate, Cobbled Deepslate, Polished Deepslate, Deepslate Bricks, Deepslate Tiles, Reinforced Deepslate

Bricks & Masonry: Bricks, Stone Bricks, Mossy Stone Bricks, Chiseled Stone Bricks, Cracked Stone Bricks, Nether Bricks, Red Nether Bricks, Chiseled Nether Bricks, Cracked Nether Bricks, End Stone Bricks, Mud Bricks

Nether & End: Netherrack, Soul Sand, Soul Soil, Magma Block, Blackstone, Polished Blackstone, Gilded Blackstone, Chiseled Polished Blackstone, Polished Blackstone Bricks, Cracked Polished Blackstone Bricks, Basalt, Polished Basalt, Smooth Basalt, End Stone

Wood & Planks: Oak, Spruce, Birch, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak, Mangrove, Cherry, Bamboo, Crimson, Warped Planks

Ore Blocks: Coal Ore, Iron Ore, Copper Ore, Gold Ore, Nether Gold Ore, Diamond Ore, Emerald Ore, Lapis Ore, Redstone Ore, Nether Quartz Ore — plus all Deepslate ore variants

Mineral Blocks: Coal, Iron, Copper, Gold, Diamond, Emerald, Netherite, Redstone, Lapis, Amethyst, Ancient Debris

Ice & Snow: Ice, Packed Ice, Blue Ice

Wool (all 16 colors), Terracotta (all 16 colors), Concrete (all 16 colors)

Misc: Bookshelf, TNT, Hay Block, Bone Block, Honeycomb Block, Nether Wart Block, Warped Wart Block, Mud, Packed Mud, Sea Lantern, Glowstone, Shroomlight, Quartz Block, Smooth Quartz, Quartz Pillar, Chiseled Quartz Block, Purpur Block, Purpur Pillar, Prismarine, Prismarine Bricks, Dark Prismarine, Magma Block

Feedback and suggestions are welcome!

Requirements

NeoForge 1.21.1
